description: Letter from Avraham Ibn Sughmār, from Fustat, to Nahray b. Nissim, Alexandria. Nahray traveled to Alexandria and the writer is sorry that he did not say goodbye. Mentions one dinar that the writer owes a person, the son of a person Ibn Sabra and he asks Nahray to arrange its return. Also mentions b. al-Qafsi, who is Maymūn b. Khalfa. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #610) VMR
description_he: מכתב מאברהם אבן סוגמאר, מפוסטאט, לנהראי בן ניסים, אלכסנדריה
